hypothesis: Augmenting the ChemX single-agent pipeline with a layout-aware molecular-figure detector fine-tuned on OCSR corpora and DECIMER-based structure recognition, plus caption/proximity linking to text mentions, will increase SMILES extraction F1 to ≥0.40 (precision ≥0.50, recall ≥0.60) and raise overall small-molecule dataset F1 by ≥0.10 versus the current single-agent baseline, without increasing non-SMILES false positives by >2 percentage points.
